name: asgeirtj
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        asgeirtj /

      system_prompts_leaks  

    
      Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
summary: 该项目提取并公开了Anthropic、OpenAI、Google、xAI等多个主流AI模型的系统提示词，值得关注因为它持续更新，为研究AI行为和安全提供了宝贵的第一手资料。

name: agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        addyosmani /

      agent-skills  

    
      Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
summary: 该项目为AI编码代理提供生产级工程技能，值得关注是因为它通过Shell脚本封装了实用的开发工作流，能显著提升AI代理在真实项目中的代码质量和效率。

name: Zackriya-Solutions
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Zackriya-Solutions /

      meetily  

    
      Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.
summary: 该项目是一个基于Rust构建的隐私优先AI会议助手，支持本地实时转录、说话人识别和摘要生成，无需云端处理。值得关注的是它完全开源、可自部署，且转录速度比传统Whisper快4倍，兼顾了隐私保护与高性能。

name: claude-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        alirezarezvani /

      claude-skills  

    
      345 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.
summary: 该项目是一个为Claude、Codex、Gemini CLI、Cursor等十余种AI编程助手提供超过345个技能、70多条自定义命令和30多个智能体的插件集合，覆盖工程、营销、产品、合规、高管咨询、研究、商业运营、财务及日常生产力等场景，因其一站式集成多领域实用技能、大幅提升AI助手工作效率而值得关注。

name: codex-plugin-cc
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        openai /

      codex-plugin-cc  

    
      Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
summary: 该项目是OpenAI官方开发的插件，允许在Claude Code中调用Codex进行代码审查或任务委派，值得关注因为它打通了OpenAI与Claude两大AI生态，实现了跨模型协作。

name: claude-video
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        bradautomates /

      claude-video  

    
      Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
summary: 该项目让Claude能够“观看”视频，通过下载、提取帧和转录，将视频内容交给Claude分析。值得关注是因为它大幅扩展了AI对视频的理解能力，无需复杂API即可实现。

name: RuView
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ruvnet /

      RuView  

    
      π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
summary: RuView 利用普通 WiFi 信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需任何摄像头，因其低成本、隐私友好的特性值得关注。

name: last30days-skill
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mvanhorn /

      last30days-skill  

    
      AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
summary: 该项目是一个AI智能体技能，能跨Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket及网络搜索任意话题，并综合生成有据可依的摘要。值得关注是因为它整合多源信息并自动提炼，极大提升了对近期热点或特定主题的调研效率。
